description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray, with large rectangular windows and minimal decorative elements. A small landscaped area with a tree and shrubbery is present near the main entrance, which is set back on a slightly raised platform. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level slightly offset from the lower, creating a stepped profile. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. A detached structure, possibly a garage or utility shed, is situated nearby.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, light gray exterior, large windows, and minimalistic landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, a small tree, and the detached structure to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the offset upper story, main landscaping, and the tree in front.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the house, visible windows, and the detached structure to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main house, landscaping, and the detached structure in the background.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a small raised platform, minimal steps, and simple landscaping including a tree.
